action.reasoning: Observation: LightGBM with label normalization achieved IC 0.0387 (rank_IC 0.0401, val IC 0.0533). Analysis: Label standardization significantly boosts ranking performance, but overfitting persists (val > test). Decision: Tune LightGBM hyperparameters to reduce overfitting: switch to MAE loss (robust), increase learning_rate to 0.03, deeper trees (leaves=255, depth=12), add more bagging (subsample=0.6, colsample=0.6), and longer early stopping patience (300). Evaluate effect on test IC.
